name: Celebration Hotel, FL
summary: FF&E procurement and installation for the Celebration Hotel in Florida, delivering guest room and public space furnishings for the landmark coastal-style property.
quote: Our focus is FF&E details so you can focus on your other responsibilities.
overview: Pinnacle South was engaged to manage FF&E for the Celebration Hotel in Celebration, Florida. The project included guest room furnishings, lobby and common area seating, and coordinated finishes for the property's distinctive coastal Southern architecture. Our team worked with ownership and the design team to source and deliver all items on schedule, supporting the hotel's standards for comfort and style.
spotlight: The property's classic exterior and courtyard setting required FF&E that complemented the architecture. We coordinated vendor lead times and installation so guest rooms and public spaces were fully furnished for opening. Quality checks and punch-list support ensured every space met ownership expectations and the property's upscale positioning.

name: Courtyard by Marriott, Cleveland, TN
summary: FF&E procurement and installation for the Courtyard by Marriott in Cleveland, Tennessee, delivering guest rooms, lobby, dining, and public spaces aligned with Marriott brand standards.
quote: Great experience. It's what you work hard to create for your hotel guests. It's also what you get with Pinnacle South.
overview: Pinnacle South supported FF&E for the Courtyard by Marriott in Cleveland, Tennessee. The scope included guest room case goods and soft goods, lobby and media pod areas, breakfast and dining venues, and coordinated finishes throughout the property. Our team worked with ownership and the project team to source and deliver selections to Courtyard brand specifications and the property schedule.
spotlight: Coordinating multiple public areas—from the front desk and courtyard entry to breakfast and bar—required aligned vendor lead times and installation sequencing. We helped ensure furnishings and finishes arrived on schedule so the Cleveland property could present a cohesive, brand-compliant guest experience from day one.

name: Hampton Inn & Suites, Tampa Ybor City Downtown, FL
summary: FF&E procurement and installation for the Hampton Inn & Suites in Tampa's Ybor City downtown district, delivering guest-focused spaces and public areas to Hilton brand standards.
quote: Distinctive design that's stylish. Smart buying that's relentless. Installation that's flawless. Personal service that's tireless. Managing process that's seamless.
overview: Pinnacle South supported FF&E for the Hampton Inn & Suites in Tampa's historic Ybor City downtown area. The project encompassed guest room furnishings, the front desk and arrival experience, breakfast and dining zones, and coordinated finishes aligned with Hampton brand guidelines. Our team coordinated with ownership and the project team on specifications, lead times, and delivery to support the property timeline.
spotlight: Delivering a cohesive Hampton experience in a vibrant downtown setting meant balancing brand standards with efficient space planning. We coordinated sourcing and installation so guest rooms and public areas were ready for opening with consistent quality, from the front desk through breakfast service.

name: Hampton Inn, Chattanooga
summary: FF&E procurement and installation for the Hampton Inn in Chattanooga, Tennessee, covering guest rooms, lobby, amenities, and public spaces to Hilton brand standards.
quote: Make your guests really feel like guests, not just customers.
overview: Pinnacle South supported FF&E for the Hampton Inn in Chattanooga, Tennessee. The scope included executive king and accessible guest room packages, standard bath configurations, the front desk and treat shop, pool and outdoor patio areas, and coordinated finishes throughout. Our team aligned selections with Hampton specifications and coordinated procurement and installation with the project schedule.
spotlight: From the arrival experience through pool and patio amenities, we coordinated multiple FF&E packages so the Chattanooga property could open with consistent Hampton branding. Guest room case goods and soft goods were sequenced with public-area installations to minimize disruption and support quality at turnover.

name: Holiday Inn Express, Nashville
summary: FF&E procurement and installation for the Holiday Inn Express in Nashville, Tennessee, covering guest rooms, breakfast and lounge areas, and public spaces to IHG brand standards.
quote: Our business is making your business grow
overview: Pinnacle South supported FF&E for the Holiday Inn Express in Nashville, Tennessee. The project included king and queen guest room packages, accessible king accommodations, king suite layouts, lobby and lounge seating, breakfast service areas, and coordinated finishes. Our team worked with ownership and the project team to align specifications with Holiday Inn Express brand requirements and coordinate delivery and installation.
spotlight: Balancing efficient guest room packages with inviting lobby, lounge, and breakfast zones was key for this Nashville property. We coordinated vendor schedules and installation so each area met brand expectations and was ready for guests on schedule.

name: Homewood Suites, McDonough, GA
summary: FF&E procurement and installation for the Homewood Suites by Hilton in McDonough, Georgia, covering extended-stay studios, accessible layouts, lodge and meeting areas, and outdoor amenities to Hilton brand standards.
quote: We do the little things that create big moments for your guests and for your revenue.
overview: Pinnacle South supported FF&E for the Homewood Suites by Hilton in McDonough, Georgia. The scope included king accessible and two-queen hearing-accessible studio suites, accessible bath configurations, dual lodge gathering areas, a classroom-style meeting room, and an outdoor grill and patio. Our team coordinated specifications, procurement, and installation with Homewood Suites brand requirements and the property schedule.
spotlight: Extended-stay properties demand durable, flexible FF&E across studios and shared spaces. We aligned guest suite packages with lodge, meeting, and patio programming so the McDonough property could welcome guests with a consistent Homewood experience from check-in through longer stays.
